criteria.requirement: Literal runx-cli 0.7.1 satisfies the required >=0.6.13 CLI floor.
Redsync is maintained third-party BSD-3-Clause OSS at an immutable commit.
The pinned project covers 15 packages, 19 non-test Go files, and 110 exported symbols.
The anonymous ReadTheDocs home and generated API pages pass live content checks.
The project-named community ReadTheDocs home has public source and an honest non-official boundary.
The Sourcey output contains at least 20 generated documentation pages.
Evidence records exact repository, commit, license, adapter, command, config, pages, and coverage.
A sealed runx receipt is verified and its complete tree reconstructs byte-for-byte.
The report gives concrete source-linked gaps useful to Redsync maintainers.
